entries.name: Clear
entries.description: Visibility is good and travel is straightforward.

entries.name: Light rain or snow
entries.description: Travel is slower and tracks become harder to read.

entries.name: Heavy weather
entries.description: Ranged visibility drops and exposed travel becomes uncomfortable.

entries.name: Mists or haze
entries.description: Shapes blur at distance and ambushes become easier.

entries.name: Strong wind
entries.description: Open flames struggle and loose objects shift or rattle.

entries.name: Oppressive stillness
entries.description: The air feels wrong and sound carries strangely.

entries.name: Sudden change
entries.description: The weather turns quickly, forcing decisions about shelter or pace.

entries.name: Omen weather
entries.description: A dramatic sky, strange light or unnatural chill foreshadows trouble.
